title: Fixture record that passes validation
official_title: Fixture Official Title for the Good Record
citation: Fixture Law issued by Royal Decree M/00 of 2021
summary: A fixture record used by the validator smoke tests to confirm that a complete, well formed document passes every check.
impact_note: This record exists only to exercise the validator. It demonstrates the minimum complete shape of a Complyr document record, including gazette metadata, an obligation with a deadline, and applicability details.

obligations.description: Notify the competent authority of personal data breaches

applicability.penalties: Fines up to a fixture amount

notes: Validator fixture, not a real instrument.
